text.title: AI Call Site Inventory Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-call-site-inventory.

decision-tree.root-question: Does every call site declare model + prompt + schema + fallback?

conclusion.verdict: FLAG — move to versioned prompt storage
FLAG — add JSON schema or grammar
FLAG — define fallback (or explicit no-fallback decision)
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
